title: Self-Hosting Compiler
description: A compiler for a subset of the VM language written IN the VM language itself. Bootstrapping verification: both compilers produce identical bytecode.
success_criteria: Self-compiler compiles subset programs. Bootstrap verification passes. Both compilers produce identical bytecode for all subset programs.
result: Extended VM with arrays+builtins, self-compiler in MiniLang (~500 lines), 104 tests, 4 bugs found (tok_pos env reset, ExprStmt stack leak, if-without-else double-POP, arithmetic test assertion). Bootstrap verification passes for all subset programs.
